_comment: metis-core infrastructure config. A consuming org fills this in once; the parameterized core scripts (free-work.py, queue-runner.py, task-domain.py, network helpers, mirror-manifest) read machines/agents/domains/network from HERE instead of hardcoding them. This is the single seam where an org declares its own topology.

agents._comment: Execution lanes/roles available to the dispatcher. The CONCEPT (role x engine) is core; the NAMES are org-chosen.

domains._comment: Project/work domains used to tag tasks. Replace with your org's domains.

notifications._comment: Optional. Channel IDs for status/alert routing; empty disables.
